title: Two-column aggregation on join result extremely slow.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ap (a1 INTEGER, a2 INTEGER, prob FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE bp (a1 INTEGER, a2 INTEGER, prob FLOAT);
INSERT INTO ap (a1, a2, prob) VALUES (1, 1, 0.5), (2, 1, 0.3), (3, 2, 0.2);
INSERT INTO bp (a1, a2, prob) VALUES (1, 1, 0.4), (2, 1, 0.6), (3, 2, 0.1);
SELECT ap.a1, bp.a1 AS a3, SUM(ap.prob * bp.prob) AS total_prob FROM ap JOIN bp ON ap.a2 = bp.a2 GROUP BY ap.a1, bp.a1;
